intro: Bombyx micranthus, also known as Small-flowered Bombycid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The bioactive constituents of Bombyx micranthus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
